data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Baseline evals passed (EXIT: 0). New eval test case added to promptfooconfig.yaml — 'Classifies testing_mode per task: RED for new source file, GREEN for pure refactor, UPDATE for behavior modification with existing coverage'.
